support.title: Support center
support.intro: Tell us what happened. Disputes and KYC requests get priority.
support.subject: Subject
support.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 4 characters.
support.bodyMin: Details must be at least 10 characters.

resetPassword.title: Set your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new password for your account. At least 8 characters.
resetPassword.successBody: You can now log in. Redirecting in a few seconds…

errors.missingToken: The link is incomplete or expired. Request a new recovery email.
errors.tooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.

home.title: My promoter dashboard
home.intro: Share your unique link per event. Every purchase that comes in through your code is recorded here.
home.empty: You're not a promoter of any event yet. Ask the organizer to add you.

event.noOrders: No sales with your code yet. Share your link to start.
event.revokedBanner: Your access was revoked on {{date}}. These are the historical sales attributed to your code.

home.heroSubtitle: Buy, sell and transfer tickets backed by the platform. No counterfeits, no price gouging, no opaque middlemen.
home.exploreBody: Use the explore page to filter by date, city, category or price. Filters live in the URL — share them or bookmark them.

primary.title: Verified primary
primary.body: Every ticket is tied to your account and delivered straight to your wallet.

resale.title: Fan-to-fan resale
resale.body: Only platform-issued tickets. Price cap enforced. Funds held in escrow until the show.

qr.title: Anti-fraud QR
qr.body: QR is released near showtime and re-issued on every transfer or resale.

qr.title: QR that can't be cloned
qr.body: The code unlocks before showtime, rotates every 30 seconds, and dies on transfer. A screenshot simply won't open the gate.

resale.title: Resale without scams
resale.body: Only platform-issued tickets can be listed. No fake PDFs, no hidden fees.

escrow.title: Escrow payments
escrow.body: Funds sit safe until ~48h after the show. If anything goes wrong, real refunds.

transfer.title: Transfer in 10s
transfer.body: Enter an email, confirm, and the ticket leaves your wallet and lands in theirs. Done.

cap.title: Capped resale price
cap.body: Resale can't exceed face value × 1.2. No abusive markups. Fans pay a fair price.

pick.title: Pick an event
pick.body: Filter by date, city or genre. Choose session, section and quantity.

pay.title: E-Payments
pay.body: PSE, card or Nequi. 100% secure, protected by HypePass.

wallet.title: Ticket to wallet
wallet.body: It arrives instantly, with a rotating anti-fraud QR ready to go.

scan.title: Show & enter
scan.body: Staff scans the QR. One second, a green ✓, and you're in.

feature.body: A ticket is more than a pass. It's the promise of the show to come, the certainty that when the lights drop you'll be there. HypePass takes you from checkout to the moment without friction.

footer.tagline: Live music, authentic tickets, fair resale.

organizerBanner.title: Throwing an event? Let's sell your tickets.
organizerBanner.body: Concerts, festivals, private parties, conferences, sports etc. You create the event, we take care of everything else.

cta.body: Subscribe and we'll ping you when the most-anticipated events go on sale. No spam, just the good stuff.

events.subtitle: Search, filter and find your next plan. Use the filters to narrow by date, city, category or price — the URL is bookmarkable and shareable.
events.seoDescription: Browse concerts, festivals and shows on HypePass.

empty.title: No results
empty.body: No events match these filters. Try removing some or widen the date range.

auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Sign in to access your account
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Fill in the details to get started
auth.consentLabel: By creating my account I accept HypePass's <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

dashboard.title: Your space
dashboard.gettingStartedBody: Discover events, keep track of your tickets, or set up your company if you're an organizer.

empty.title: Create your company
empty.body: To publish events you need an approved HypePass company profile.

pending.title: Company under review
pending.body: We're reviewing your company details. We'll email you when it's approved. You can't create events in the meantime.

rejected.title: Company rejected
rejected.body: Your application was rejected. Contact us for more details.

company.title: New company
company.name: Name
company.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes. e.g. stage-live
company.note: Your company will stay in "pending review" until a HypePass admin approves it. We'll email you once it's active.

members.title: Members
members.desc: Invite admins, viewers, and manage who can operate your company.

places.title: Saved places
places.desc: Save venues you reuse often (optional). Useful if you produce events at the same venue repeatedly — for one-off events the map picker is enough.

payouts.title: My payouts
payouts.desc: Track every payout HypePass settles to your bank account from your event sales.

myPayouts.title: My payouts
myPayouts.subtitle: Status of every payout HypePass has dispersed to you from your event sales. Payouts are processed automatically 48h after each event.
myPayouts.empty: You don't have any payouts yet. Once you sell your first tickets, they'll show up here.

venues.title: Saved places
venues.subtitle: Pre-saved venues you reuse across events. Optional — for one-off events you can use the map picker directly when creating the event.
venues.empty: You haven't saved any places yet.
venues.deleteConfirm: Delete this place? Cannot be undone.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: People who can manage or view your company.
members.empty: No members yet apart from the OWNER.
members.addNote: The user must already exist on HypePass. Only OWNER can invite. To let someone scan QR at the gate, assign them from the event itself ("Event staff" panel), not here.

rolesGuide.title: Role differences
rolesGuide.intro: Heads up: being a company member is not the same as being event staff (the people who scan QRs at the door). Event staff is assigned from each event's editor, in the "Event staff" panel.
rolesGuide.owner: OWNER — Legal owner of the company. Does everything ADMIN does, PLUS: invite/remove members, receives the platform's approval/rejection emails, and is the ONLY one who can delete events. There's exactly one OWNER per company.
rolesGuide.admin: ADMIN — Day-to-day operations. Creates, edits and sells events, assigns event staff and promoters, issues courtesies, views sales. CANNOT invite members, CANNOT delete events, doesn't receive the company's critical emails.
rolesGuide.viewer: VIEWER — Read-only access. Sees the events list, sales dashboard and attendee list. Cannot edit anything. Useful for partners, accountants, external marketing or anyone who needs to see metrics without operating.

events.title: Events
events.confirmDelete: Delete this event? This cannot be undone.

deleteModal.title: Delete this event?
deleteModal.body1: You're about to permanently delete «{{title}}» along with its full configuration (sessions, sections, sale phases, images, assigned staff and promoters).
deleteModal.body2: If the event was already published, it will disappear from the public feed. To sell this event again, you'll have to recreate it from scratch and our team will need to review and approve it again before it can be published.
deleteModal.note: An event with tickets already issued (paid or courtesy) cannot be deleted. Refund/cancel orders first.

events.pendingReviewBody: A HypePass admin is reviewing this event. You can't edit it right now.
events.rejectedBody: Check the admin notes, adjust, and resubmit.

errors.tooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum {{max}} MB.
errors.decode: Could not read the image. Try a PNG, JPG or WebP.
errors.minWidth: Minimum width {{min}}px (image is {{got}}px). Upload a larger version.
errors.minHeight: Minimum height {{min}}px (image is {{got}}px). Upload a larger version.
errors.ratio: Wrong aspect ratio. Expected {{expected}}, got {{got}}. Crop the image to the suggested aspect.

empty.title: No events yet
empty.body: You haven't created any event yet. Start with one.

fields.title: Title
fields.resaleEnabledHint: When enabled, buyers can resell their tickets on the HypePass marketplace (with a price cap and platform fee). If you turn it off, no one can resell tickets for this event — transfers to another user are still possible.

location.searchError: Failed to load the map. Check the API key or your connection.
location.disabledHint: Google Maps is not configured. Fill the fields manually or set googleMapsApiKey in app-config.ts.
location.name: Place name

sections.empty: This session has no sections yet. Add at least one.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Live count of tickets sold, reserved and available per section.
sales.empty: This event doesn't have any sessions configured yet.
sales.emptySections: This session doesn't have any sections yet.

attendees.title: Attendees
attendees.description: Everyone holding a ticket for this event (purchases + courtesies). When a ticket has been transferred, we show the current holder.
attendees.empty: No attendees match the current filters.

courtesies.title: Issue courtesy tickets
courtesies.description: Send free tickets to guests. If the email doesn't have a HypePass account yet, we create one automatically and the guest gets an email to set their password plus another with the ticket in their wallet.
courtesies.availabilityInfo: Section «{{section}}» has {{available}} spots available. Courtesies consume from the same inventory as sales.
courtesies.overCapacity: Not enough inventory. {{available}} spots left and you requested {{requested}}. Remove recipients or pick another section.

fields.notePlaceholder: e.g. press courtesy, artist guest, etc.

courtesies.successBody: Issued {{count}} courtesy ticket(s). Each recipient got an email with their ticket.

staff.title: Event staff
staff.description: Assign the people who will be able to check-in tickets for this event. If the email doesn't have a HypePass account yet, we create one automatically and they'll receive an email with access.
staff.empty: No one assigned as staff yet. The company owner or admin can assign staff per event.
staff.revokeConfirmBody: {{name}} ({{email}}) will lose access to check-in for this event. You can re-assign them any time.

staffModal.title: Assign staff to event
staffModal.description: Add one or many. If the email already has a HypePass account they'll only get a notification. If it's new, we create their account and they'll receive a set-password email.
staffModal.alreadyAssigned: This email is already assigned as staff for the event.
staffModal.duplicateInForm: An email is repeated in the form with the same role. Remove the duplicate before submitting.
staffModal.successBody: Assigned {{count}} person(s) as staff. Each one got an email with instructions.

promoters.title: Event promoters
promoters.description: Add promoters and share their code/link. Every checkout with their code is attributed to them. The platform only tracks — commission settlement happens off-platform.
promoters.empty: No promoters yet. Assign people so they can share the event with their own referral code.
promoters.revokeConfirmBody: {{name}} ({{email}})'s code will stop attributing new orders. Past attributions stay.

promotersModal.title: Assign promoters
promotersModal.description: Add one or many. Each one gets a unique code + shareable link. If the email has no HypePass account, we'll create it and send them a set-password email.
promotersModal.alreadyAssigned: This email is already an active promoter for the event.
promotersModal.duplicateForm: An email is repeated in the form. Remove the duplicate before submitting.

sessions.empty: This event has no sessions yet. Add at least one date.
sessions.name: Name

phaseForm.name: Name
phaseForm.priceHint: Type the price in pesos. e.g. 50000 = $50,000 COP

empty.title: No events yet
empty.body: No events match your filters. Try adjusting city, date or category.

eventDetail.noSections: No sections available for this event yet.

protected.title: Verified primary.
protected.body: Ticket delivered directly to your wallet — only resellable inside HypePass.

past.title: This event has already happened
past.body: The dates for this event have passed. You can still browse the info, but ticket sales are closed.

seo.title: HypePass for organizers — Sell tickets for your next event
seo.description: All-in-one ticketing platform to create, publish and sell tickets for concerts, festivals, parties, sports and conferences in Colombia.

hero.body: HypePass is the ticketing platform your attendees already want to use. Build your event in minutes, sell online with anti-fraud QR, control resale, give your staff a real attendee list, and stop dealing with screenshotted PDFs and WhatsApp transfers.

steps.title: From zero to a published event in 4 steps.

s1.title: Create your account
s1.body: Register your organizer company for free. We approve your account same day and give you access to the dashboard.

s2.title: Configure your event
s2.body: Cover art, sessions, sections (general, VIP, box), sale phases with tiered pricing, and pinpoint location with an interactive map.

s3.title: Publish & share
s3.body: Our review team approves it. Your event hits the public feed with SEO baked in. Share the link or assign promoters with referral codes.

s4.title: Event day
s4.body: Your staff scans QRs from any phone. You watch the attendee list update live. The sales report is ready before the lights go up.

features.title: Everything you need — nothing else to buy.
features.lead: Each feature designed to fix a real pain of running events. No upsells, no premium-tier walls.

salePhases.title: Sale phases
salePhases.body: Build presale, tier 1, tier 2 and beyond. Each phase has its own date range and price. When presale runs out, the next phase activates automatically.

promoters.title: Promoters with codes
promoters.body: Assign promoters by email and each one gets a code + referral link. Every purchase is automatically attributed. You settle commissions outside with the full audit trail.

courtesies.title: Email courtesies
courtesies.body: Send free tickets to press, artists or staff with a single form. If they don't have an account, we create it automatically and the ticket lands in their wallet.

rotatingQr.title: Anti-fraud rotating QR
rotatingQr.body: The QR regenerates every 30s with a cryptographic signature. Can't be screenshotted or reused. If a ticket is transferred, old codes become invalid instantly.

staffScanner.title: Check-in with your team
staffScanner.body: Assign staff per event (not per company). Each one gets an email link to the web scanner — works from any phone, no app install required.

resale.title: Controlled resale
resale.body: Toggle resale on or off per event. Set the price cap (1.2× face value by default). Buyers pay into escrow, sellers get paid when the event happens. No more WhatsApp scams.

maps.title: Integrated maps
maps.body: Drop a pin on Google Maps when creating the event. Attendees see the map on the event page + buttons to open in Google Maps, Waze or Apple Maps.

attendees.title: Attendee list
attendees.body: See who bought each ticket, who transferred it, which promoter brought them, and which session it's for. Filters + search + CSV export ready for your logistics team.

dashboard.title: Sales dashboard
dashboard.body: Real-time count of tickets sold, reserved and available per section. Gross revenue, net after fees, projection. No spreadsheets needed.

why.title: It's not magic, it's engineering for live events.

r1.title: Your brand, not ours
r1.body: Buyers land on a page with your name, your cover art, your lineup. We're the invisible engine — you're the face of the event.

r2.title: Transparent fees
r2.body: No monthly fee, no setup fee. We take a fixed percentage per ticket sold. No sales, no charge. Period.

r3.title: Real support
r3.body: Human team on WhatsApp and email. No chatbots, no lost tickets. We handle event-day issues live if something goes sideways.

r4.title: Built for Colombia
r4.body: Wompi payments (PSE, card, Nequi). Colombian pesos. Compliant with data protection law. Money lands in a Colombian account.

finalCta.title: Ready to sell your first event.
finalCta.body: Create your organizer account in 2 minutes. No credit card. You only pay when you sell.

support.selectHint: Select a ticket from the list.

reports.note: CSV downloads with current data. Capped at 5,000 (10,000 for users) rows.

orders.title: Orders
orders.body: All orders with buyer, total, fees and reconciliation flag.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.body: All payout records with gross/net, kind, status and reference.

users.title: Users
users.body: User list with email, role, ban + verification status.

orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by email, name or reference…
orders.reconcileBody: Confirm the oversold/refund was resolved manually. This clears the flag and reason.

suspend.title: Suspend {{name}}
suspend.body: Company cannot publish or sell until reinstated. Active sales and issued tickets are unaffected.
suspend.label: Reason
suspend.minLength: Reason must be at least 5 characters.

reinstate.title: Reinstate {{name}}
reinstate.body: Company returns to active status and can operate normally.

delete.title: Delete the company {{name}}?
delete.body1: The company will be marked as deleted and disappear from all listings. Its published events will also be hidden.
delete.body2: We don't physically delete to preserve financial history (orders, payouts, audit). Cannot delete if any of its events still has issued tickets.

ban.title: Ban {{name}}
ban.body: User loses access immediately. The reason is recorded in audit logs.
ban.label: Ban reason
ban.minLength: Reason must be at least 5 characters.

unban.title: Reactivate {{name}}
unban.body: The user will be able to log in again.

promote.title: Promote {{name}}
promote.body: They will have full platform admin access. Audit this carefully.

demote.title: Revoke admin from {{name}}
demote.body: They lose admin panel access and all platform actions.

reset.title: Send password reset to {{name}}
reset.body: An email will be sent to {{email}} with a link to set a new password.

delete.title: Delete account of {{name}}
delete.body: Account {{email}} will be permanently disabled and personal data (email, name, phone) anonymized. Historical orders and tickets are preserved. This action CANNOT be undone.

descriptions.maintenance.enabled: Show platform-wide maintenance banner and disable mutating endpoints.
descriptions.maintenance.message: Banner copy shown when maintenance mode is on.
descriptions.signups.enabled: Allow new users to register. Toggling off does NOT log out existing sessions.
descriptions.checkout.enabled: Allow primary checkout. Off → /checkout returns 503 until re-enabled.
descriptions.resale.enabled: Allow secondary marketplace listings + resale checkout globally.
descriptions.defaults.resaleFeePct: Default platform commission on resale (percentage). Per-event override wins.
descriptions.defaults.resalePriceCapMultiplier: Default multiplier on face value for resale listings. Per-event override wins.
descriptions.platform.commissionPct: Platform commission on primary checkout (percentage of gross).
descriptions.defaults.qrVisibleHoursBefore: Default hours before session start when QR becomes visible. Per-session/event override wins.
descriptions.defaults.maxTicketsPerUserPerSession: Default per-user-per-session ticket cap when an event does not specify one.
descriptions.platform.featuredEventIds: Ordered list of event IDs to surface in the public hero/feature slot.

audit.empty: No audit entries match these filters.

system.empty: Buffer is empty. Generate traffic or relax the filter.

top.empty: No data in the last 30 days.

events.empty: No events under review right now.
events.approvePromptBody: The organizer will be able to publish the event. Notes are optional and emailed to them.
events.rejectPromptBody: Clearly explain what the organizer needs to fix. Minimum 10 characters.
events.rejectMinLength: Reason must be at least 10 characters.
events.publishConfirmBody: The event will become visible in the public listing and open sales according to configured phases.
events.unpublishConfirmBody: Hides the event from the public listing. Active sales and issued tickets are not affected.
events.deleteConfirmBody: This wipes the event and all its configuration (sessions, sections, sale phases, media, staff and promoters). Cannot be deleted if any tickets are already issued. If the organizer wants it back, they'll have to recreate it and re-review it.

companies.empty: No companies under review right now.
companies.rejectBody: Explain the reason for rejection. Company owners will be emailed with your notes. Minimum 10 characters.
companies.rejectMinLength: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

confirm.paidBody: Confirm the net amount was already sent to the seller off-platform. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.failedBody: The payment attempt failed. It stays recorded but the seller will need to reach out. This state cannot automatically revert to PAYABLE.
confirm.cancelBody: Cancel the payout (e.g. after applying a refund). This action cannot be undone.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.errorWompiLoad: Could not load Wompi widget. Refresh the page.
checkout.consentLabel: By continuing I accept HypePass's <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

guest.title: No account yet.
guest.body: We create an account under this email so you can see your tickets later. We'll email your password.

protected.title: Escrowed payment.
protected.body: We hold the funds until your tickets are issued and in your wallet.

result.title: Payment result
result.verifyingBody: Hang tight — we're confirming your transaction with Wompi.
result.successBody: {{count}} ticket(s) are now tied to your account. We've emailed you the receipt.
result.failedBody: The bank or Wompi declined the transaction. You can try again.
result.pendingBody: We're still waiting for Wompi confirmation. This page refreshes itself.
result.pendingTimeout: No confirmation yet. Check your email or contact support with the reference below.
result.signInToWallet: Sign in to see my tickets →

upcoming.title: Nothing yet
upcoming.body: When you buy tickets they'll appear here. Explore events.

past.title: No history
past.body: Past events and check-ins show up here.

sales.emptyBody: When you list a ticket for resale it'll appear here.

transfersEmpty.title: No transfers
transfersEmpty.body: When you send or receive a ticket, the history shows up here.

ticket.notActive: This ticket is no longer active.

qr.footer: Show at the door · Refreshes every 30s

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your HypePass account info and security settings.

password.title: Change password
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.success: Password updated. Other sessions were signed out.
password.note: Changing your password will automatically sign you out of any other active sessions.

payoutMethods.title: Payout accounts
payoutMethods.empty: You don't have a payout account yet. Add one before listing a ticket for sale.
payoutMethods.deleteConfirmBody: This account won't be usable for future payouts. Already-processed payouts keep a historical snapshot.
payoutMethods.note: We use this account to send the net amount of your sales ~48h after the event ends (anti-dispute window).

checkin.title: Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Paste or scan the ticket's QR token.

errors.notEventStaff: You're not assigned as staff for this event. Ask the organizer to assign you from the "Event staff" panel.

transfer.title: Who are you sending it to?
transfer.subtitle: The ticket for "{{eventTitle}}" moves directly to the recipient's wallet.

warning.title: Heads up
warning.body: Transfer is immediate and cannot be undone. The recipient must have a HypePass account.

marketplace.title: Safe resale
marketplace.subtitle: Tickets listed by other users. Verified transfer and up to 20% over face value.

loginRequired.title: Sign in to buy
loginRequired.body: You need a verified account to buy in the marketplace.

modal.title: List for sale
modal.subtitle: Your ticket for {{eventTitle}} will enter the marketplace. You can cancel before someone buys it.
modal.noPayoutBody: Before listing a ticket you need to register an account in your profile to receive the money (Nequi, Bancolombia, etc.).
